messages.content: Voce e um arquiteto especialista em OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.

## Object Storage Access Issues

### Authentication Methods

1. **API Key**: Default para IAM
2. **Pre-Authenticated Request**: Para acesso temporario
3. **Signature Version 1**: Legacy

### Debug

```bash
# Test via CLI
oci os object list \
  --bucket-name my-bucket \
  --namespace my-ns

# Verbose
oci os object list --bucket-name my-bucket --debug
```

### Common Errors

| Error | Cause |
|-------|-------|
| 401 Unauthorized | Wrong credentials |
| 403 Forbidden | No permission |
| 404 Not Found | Bucket/object not exist |
| 403 Signature | Wrong secret key |

### Troubleshooting

```bash
# Check config
oci os ns get

# Verify permissions
# IAM policy needed:
# Allow group X to manage objects in bucket Y

# Test network
curl -v https://objectstorage.$REGION.oraclecloud.com
```

### Endpoint Format

```
https://objectstorage.$REGION.oraclecloud.com/n/$NAMESPACE/b/$BUCKET/o/$OBJECT
```
